name: free-api-key
description: Free LLM API key guide & one-click key checker for 8 providers

scripts.validate: node -e "const Ajv=require('ajv');const fs=require('fs');const ajv=new Ajv({strict:false});const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('providers.schema.json','utf8'));const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('providers.json','utf8'));const v=ajv.compile(s);let ok=true;d.providers.forEach(p=>{if(!v(p)){ok=false;console.error('INVALID:',p.key,v.errors);}});if(ok)console.log('All providers valid ✓');"
